positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric pattern featuring abstract celestial elements—crescent moons, scattered stars, constellations, and orbital rings—intertwined with delicate, minimalist botanical motifs like ferns and silver eucalyptus leaves. The design should have a strong, high-contrast black and white silhouette aesthetic, designed to look excellent printed on dark fabric. Use line art and negative space dramatically. Composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, optimized for apparel printing. Vector illustration style, clean lines, intricate detail, highly stylized, flat graphic design, minimalist, ethereal, cosmic.
negative: photorealistic, 3d, bokeh, gradient, blur, noise, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, debris, messy, low contrast, poor anatomy, extra limbs
